comments.author: duncan-abela-carma
comments.body: Any idea if this will be accepted?

comments.author: zurmokeeper
comments.body: @yapus Could you please move [over here](https://github.com/zurmokeeper/excelize)? I'd be happy to merge this feature.

comments.author: yapus
comments.body:
> @zurmokeeper 
> @yapus Could you please move [over here](https://github.com/zurmokeeper/excelize)? I'd be happy to merge this feature.

What's that? A new maintained fork? How compatible is it with the original ExcelJS? How far did you go from latest exceljs:master? I'll have to take some time check that out

comments.author: kiwiot
comments.body: I can confirm that this solves issues I have with image writing and file corruption
